properties.NAME: Graffunder House
properties.DESCRIPTION: A good representation of residential, mid-century modern architecture arising from the International style.   The building is characteristically simple and elegant in its use of materials, design and form.  The exterior is asymmetrical and features minimal ornamentation. Unusually long grey bricks on the façade, together with the low pitched roof give the house a low, horizontal appearance.
